reasoning: Based on the available evidence up to the knowledge cutoff of October 26, 2025, there has been no news of a settlement between Pxie and Destiny. The lawsuit was filed in February 2025, meaning any settlement by the end of the year would require resolution within the next ~2 months (November-December 2025). The animosity between the two is very high, with Destiny characterizing Pxie's reported $15 million settlement demand as "extortion" and expressing doubt about settling because of the reputational damage already inflicted. Given standard federal civil litigation timelines (which often run 12-24+ months) and Destiny's explicit refusal to entertain early settlement demands, the probability of them reaching a settlement agreement within the narrow remaining 9-week window of 2025 is very low. Even if the case is dismissed or dropped, it would not fulfill the "settle" criteria, further reducing the chances of a YES resolution.
batch_queries: Will Pxie and Destiny settle their lawsuit by the end of 2025?
